scope: TG-P14 practical roofline audit for generated 8B attention after KV_BOTH recovery
candidate_route: generated live-split G5 block tile + split-preserving fused combine + KV_BOTH staging

practical_baseline.description: Owned HIP attention route from the same qk_tg_p5_attention_wd.py W==D session; all non-attention kernels are identical between arms, so candidate-owned wall delta is attention-route residual.

method.why_no_rerun: The completed W==D runs already provide same-session medians and caused transient TTM D-state spikes; this audit is arithmetic over measured artifacts.
method.pct_from: reported pct_of_owned and cross-check from owned_w_ms / candidate_w_ms

correctness_and_binding.correctness_authority: qk_prefilled_route_parity.py: generated route == owned 48/48 token-identical with real prefill

raw_hbm_context.note: This is only raw hardware context. The promotion baseline here is practical owned-route parity, not raw HBM peak.

classification.promotion_interpretation: PROMOTABLE only if BoltBeam candidate manifest explicitly marks this route as a practical-roofline replacement / handwritten-surface reduction; otherwise close out further route variants but do not flip default.

what_left.for_98pct_task_bar: nothing performance-critical; already clears >=98% at both protected contexts across 3 reps.
what_left.for_practical_roofline_closeout: package this artifact for BoltBeam practical-roofline ingestion and add an explicit replacement objective if promotion should be authorized.
what_left.for_owned_beating_win: only ~0.122-0.138 ms/token remains to equal owned, about 3.4-3.8 us/layer. The known lever is vectorized PV, but it is blocked by vec-store-to-REG UOp lowering and has a small maximum payoff.
what_left.recommended_next_action: Do not chase more route tuning for TG-P14. Treat the route as practical-ceiling-closeout unless the goal changes from purity/parity to an owned-beating speed win.
